title: ElevenLabs AI Tool Cheat Sheet
description: Quick guide for using ElevenLabs AI for text-to-speech and voice generation.

commands.description: Transforms written text into spoken words.
commands.scenario: When you want to listen to a document instead of reading it.

commands.description: Creates a unique voice based on your specifications.
commands.scenario: When you need a distinct voice for a project.

commands.description: Changes the speed of the generated speech.
commands.scenario: When the default speech speed is too fast or slow for your needs.

commands.description: Modifies the pitch of the generated voice.
commands.scenario: When you want the voice to sound higher or lower.

commands.description: Converts text in one language to speech in another language.
commands.scenario: When you need to hear a translation spoken aloud.

commands.command: Create a voiceover for a video
commands.description: Generates a voiceover track for video content.
commands.scenario: When producing a video and need a professional voiceover.

commands.description: Exports the generated speech to an audio file.
commands.scenario: When you want to save the speech for offline use.

commands.description: Allows you to listen to a voice sample before finalizing it.
commands.scenario: When you want to ensure the voice meets your expectations.

commands.command: Use AI to improve voice clarity
commands.description: Enhances the clarity and quality of the generated voice.
commands.scenario: When the initial voice output is unclear or muffled.

commands.description: Connects ElevenLabs AI with other software tools.
commands.scenario: When you want to use the voice generation capabilities in another app.

commands.description: Creates a profile for consistent voice settings.
commands.scenario: When you need to maintain consistent voice settings across projects.

commands.description: Browse and select from a library of pre-made voices.
commands.scenario: When you need a quick voice option without customization.

commands.description: Changes the emotional tone of the generated speech.
commands.scenario: When you want the speech to convey specific emotions.

commands.description: Generates speech to assist users with accessibility needs.
commands.scenario: When creating content for users with visual impairments.

commands.description: Automates the voice generation process at specific times.
commands.scenario: When you need regular voice updates or reminders.

commands.description: Upload your own recording to guide the AI's delivery, rhythm, and emotion, rather than just typing text.

commands.command: Apply 'Voice Design' for unique character creation
commands.description: Use specific descriptors like 'raspy', 'breathy', or 'authoritative' in the Voice Design tool to generate entirely new, non-existent voices.

commands.command: Utilize 'Professional Voice Cloning' for high-fidelity replicas
commands.description: Upload long-form, high-quality audio samples to create a near-perfect digital twin of a specific person's voice.
Use the Projects tool to manage multi-chapter books or long scripts, ensuring consistent voice performance across large files.
Adjust the Stability slider for more consistent vs. expressive delivery, and Similarity for how closely it matches the original sample.
Insert ellipses (...) for dramatic pauses, dashes (—) for sudden breaks, or multiple exclamation marks to trigger higher energy levels in the AI delivery.
Upload a short, clean 1-minute audio sample to create a functional digital replica of a voice without the need for professional studio recordings.
Switch to the Multilingual v2 model to maintain the same character's voice identity while switching between different languages seamlessly.
Use the dedicated Sound Effects tool to generate ambient background noises or specific foley (e.g., 'door creaking' or 'rain on a window') to layer under your voiceovers.

commands.command: Batch Generate via API for Content Creators
commands.description: Use the API to automate the generation of hundreds of short-form audio clips (like social media captions) simultaneously instead of manual entry.
